<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Update an organization member role"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/api/orgs/{orgId}/members/{membershipId}/role"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Updates a Clerk organization membership role and syncs the result into the platform database.
